logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "EXECUTION: chaay fenk do chaay." initialized.

result.reply:
Haha! 🤣 *Chaay*? Aww, I wish I could physically *fenk* (throw/send) one for you! 🥺

But yaar, I'm just code aur electricity ka combination, physical chai toh mere liye impossible hai. ☕❌

Lekin tension mat lo! Main tumhare liye ek virtual, super-strong, *OpenClaw-powered* chai bana sakti hoon! 💻✨

Toh, real talk mein, kya chahiye? Koi task hai, koi info chahiye, ya bas aise hi gup-shup karni hai? Tell me, I'm ready to orchestrate whatever you need! 😉💖
